item.title: Cartoon Cosplays from Kamii Momoru
item.description:
Peach, Daisy, and Rosalina try out Spider-Gwen, Spider-Woman, and Silk outfits. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1720517306688655667
Cammy White is going to kick ass in her Barbie outfit! Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1684263462061342723
Pomni is a little nervous in her Classic Harley outfit. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1718339365837947199
Purah helped dress up Wall-E to look like her favorite little adventurer. Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1658244458737987585
Daisy looks great in her Zero Suit, right?? Source: https://x.com/kamii_momoru/status/1522289057333755904
Mordecai and Rigby are ready for adventure! Source: https://x.com/Kamii_momoru/status/1497719723366125568 All art is by Kamii Momoru: https://www.instagram.com/momoru_kamii/ - - - - - I saw that this artist had a lot of characters in cosplay, so I figured I'd share! What's a character swap cosplay you'd like to see??
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.title: One of my favorite jokes of all time
item.description: This is very unrelated to the post, but I wanted to help an Imgur friend out who lost a dog and need help with the vet bills https://www.gofundme.com/f/put-everything-i-had-into-trying-to-save-my-dog-need-help
item.dc:creator: Rikyii

item.title: Unholy Sunday Stolen Dump of Chaotic Memes
item.description:
1. It's going well, I can see
2. The best defense is offense
3. Haters will say this is faked in some way
4. Customer service
5. Yeah, what's up with that?!
6
7. The Grindset is strong here
8. As it was written
9. A happy man
10. What genre would give up to live in a mansion? (Also I'm picturing FBI agent being on you 24/7 and the moment you decided to listen to rap, they kick you out of the mansion)
11. Excuse me sir, but you're in my seat
12. That's how he sleeps
13. Rump shaker
14. To everyone who scrolled trough this dump, you deserve the clapping seal gang
15. And finally I would like to share with you some footage of a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game that I'm currently developing. If you liked the humor in this dump, I'm pretty sure the game is for you! Here as a full novel that I put in the game that I got a ghost writer to write. It will change the way you look at life and your inner self! Anyway, please wishlist, as small indie devs can't do it without good natured people like you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: 22 memes
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/z89kqcRg

item.title: Images of Note: Bootloops
item.description:
Fluffy doesn't care. Fluffy can read. Fluffy gonna sit on the cake.
This is an edgy meme, is it referring to itself?
End users: "Can...can we modify it to our preferences?" Linux: "Yes of course!" Windows: "YOU WILL USE THIS LLM AND FUCKIN' LIKE IT!"
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii All hail the trees
oh no
:)
SCART phone
what...what does that sound like?
Waitrose is wrong: Waitrose should look like old-money ultra-posh Dark Academia type. They got M&S right though.
Remember this
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Follow for BLUE PISS
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
What do you mean too weak FromSoft?
The difference is you get to study what's interesting to you, the coolstuff.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Love how I can deez nuts people
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I made a tracker for Alien RPG
item.description:
Five most comman stats and resources, plus a slider for panic level. Made from acrylic, some pla parts, magnets, and a steel rod.
Fits normal size IDs through a slot in the top and has a hook for a lanyard
Here's how it slides in
Swappable dials!
Here was my first draft. I'll probably return and make this again but fix some things I addressed with Big Chap above. I like the small format of this one and it uses less materials overall - would be good to offer both.
item.dc:creator: Frostycopper

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Hey everyone it's MrPuckett here with TheFreePizzaDude! If you'd like to send food to an Imgurian going through a tough tim there are 2 easy ways on this post -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them, then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and one of the Angels will send the food for you!
If you'd like one of us to send the food for you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 9pm central
My foster Dixie is here to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
13,788 meals since we started 840 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's tally: 240 1st by PizzaAngel @TheCraicen 245 2nd by Pizza Angel@TheCraicen 300 3rd, 4th, 5th and 6th, by @OP 330 7th by Pizza Angel @grim42 345 8th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 355 9th and 10th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 405 11th and 12th by Pizza Angel @grim42 430 13th by Pizza Angel @OmegaWumpus 440 14th and 15th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 445 16th by Pizza Angel @omegawumpus 450 17th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 455 18th and 19th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 510 20th, 21st, 22nd and Michael Jordan by @OP 520 Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 525 25th, 26th, 27th and 28th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 535 29th and 30th by Pizza Angel @corwinlw 540 31st and 32nd by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 550 33rd and 34th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 620 35th, 36th and 37th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 630 38th by Pizza Angel @TheCraicen 645 39th and 40th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 700 41st, The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything, 43rd and 44th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 711 45th, 46th and 47th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 714 48th, 49th, 50th and 51st by @OP 720 52nd by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 722 53rd, 54th, 55th and 56th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI 733 57th and 58th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 740 59th and 60th by Pizza Angel @@IrvingSchwinglepuck 753 61st and 62nd by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 800 63rd and 64th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 800 65th, 66th and 67th by Pizza Angel @keithabandit 800 68th, 69th, 70th, 71st, 72nd, 73rd, 74th, 75th, 76th and 77th by Pizza Angel @morganVPI ... Today's Grocery Tally 340 1st by Grocery Angel @StabbyTheCat 410 2nd by Grocery Angel @grim42 430 3rd by Grocery Angel @OmegaWumpus 435 4th by Grocery Angel @keithabandit 500 5th by Grocery Angel @keithabandit 550 6th by @OP 715 7th by Grocery Angel @keithabandit 722 8th by Grocery Angel @OmegaWumpus 800 9th by Grocery Angel @StabbyTheCat ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 77 meals Filled 9 huge grocery orders That's 13,865 meals since we started 849 grocery orders sent Wow what a post! See you all next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Love this outfit, and her message!
item.description:
This is Yasmin Benoit.
She identifies as goth and asexual.
When people think of "goth girls" or "goth boys", it's usually a milky pale person. Yasmin wants the world to remember that people of all races love the deep, dark intensity of goth culture. Have a read of this great op-ed she wrote all about the subject: https://metro.co.uk/2020/05/22/goths-come-shapes-colours-12744513/ Most Viral Edit: support your local goths! Especially in this heat!
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.title: A dump of older Favorites.
item.description:
Me.
But also me...
JUSTICE! (Kiki's Delivery Service, and that bitch getting served with her grandma's herring pie.)
I love shit like this. I know it's a trick, you even get to watch them change size, and it STILL fucks with my brain.
